ham.subject: Out of Office: [Your Name] - Returning 15th June
ham.body:
Hello,

I am currently out of the office on vacation and will not return until June 15th. I will have limited access to email during this period.

If you require immediate assistance, please contact my colleague [Colleague Name] at colleague@example.com or call our main line at 555-1234.

Thank you for your understanding.

Best regards,
[Your Name]
[Your Position]
[Company Name]

spam.subject: URGENT: Your University Scholarship Application Requires Immediate Action
spam.body:
Dear Applicant,

We are pleased to inform you that you have been shortlisted for the prestigious Global Excellence Scholarship offered by XYZ University. In order to finalize your award, we need you to provide the following documents within the next 48 hours:

- Official Transcript
- Proof of Residency
- Signed Scholarship Agreement

Failure to submit these documents promptly may result in the forfeiture of your scholarship opportunity.

Please click the link below to upload your files securely:
<URL>

Sincerely,
Dr. Emily Carter
Director of Student Affairs
XYZ University
